title: Strategy Pattern
subtitle: Swap algorithm/policy at runtime without changing caller

panels.heading: Without Strategy
bullets: Hard to test each branch independently

panels.heading: With Strategy
bullets: Each algorithm is a separate implementation
Swap via config, DI, or feature flag

panels.heading: vs Template Method
bullets: Template: fixed skeleton, swap some steps

footer: Strategy = caller picks algorithm. If behavior self-transitions, that's State. If you're fixing a skeleton, that's Template Method.
